title: eryngium carlinae
intro: Eryngium carlinae, also known as the Princess's Pine or Giant Sea Holly, is a plant species within the family Apiaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can be attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. Eryngium carlinae is often used in herbal preparations, such as infusions, teas, and tinctures, and is also utilized in traditional medicine for its therapeutic properties.
